title: Baby & Baby
desc: Two traditional families await newborns. A hospital mix-up turns their lives upside down. What follows is confusion, chaos, and a hilarious journey of parenting and identity.

title: Turbo
desc: Turbo is a garden snail who dreams of racing. After a freak accident, he gains incredible speed and races in the Indy 500, overcoming challenges with help from friends and family.

title: Bhool Bhulaiyaa 2
desc: Bhool Bhulaiyaa 2 - 2022 - When strangers Reet and Ruhan cross paths, their journey leads to an abandoned mansion and a dreaded spirit who has been trapped for 18 years.

title: Krishnarjuna Yuddham
desc: Doppelgangers Krishna and Arjun join forces to rescue their loved ones from kidnappers, navigating a global adventure together.

title: The Mummy
desc: Adventurer Rick O'Connell and Egyptologist Evelyn, along with a bunch of archaeologists, inadvertently wake up a bedeviled mummy during an archaeological excavation at the ancient city of Hamunaptra.

title: Top Gear
desc: Arjun, a taxi driver, faces danger when a drug dealer kidnaps his wife, forcing him into a risky mission to rescue her and survive.

title: Mumbai Saga
desc: When his brother is nearly killed by goons, Amartya Rao plunges into Mumbai's underworld, becoming a powerful don while facing ruthless rivals and an unstoppable policeman.

title: Rifle Club
desc: A hunting club in Kerala defends a couple from a vengeful arms dealer. Skilled members fight a violent siege, protecting their legacy in a thrilling mix of action, survival, and sharp shootouts.
